evals.name: single-bugfix
evals.prompt: I just fixed a bug in the repo at REPO_PATH. Commit my changes.
evals.expected_output: A single Conventional Commit of type fix with an imperative, lowercase subject (no trailing period) and a terse body explaining WHY the change was made, not restating the diff.

evals.name: mixed-changes-split
evals.prompt: Commit the changes in the repo at REPO_PATH.
evals.expected_output: The skill notices the changes are unrelated (a new feature, a dependency bump, and a docs edit), proposes splitting them into separate atomic Conventional Commits (feat / build / docs), rather than one bundled commit.

evals.name: breaking-change
evals.prompt: Commit the API changes in the repo at REPO_PATH and push a PR.
evals.expected_output: A Conventional Commit that flags the breaking change with a ! after the type/scope AND a BREAKING CHANGE: footer describing the impact and migration.
